experiments.name: noise_low
experiments.description: Reduce all three noise strengths to a quiet regime.

experiments.name: noise_medium
experiments.description: Project default noise level; useful as a labeled baseline.

experiments.name: noise_high
experiments.description: Heavier noise on amplitude, phase, and additive paths.

experiments.name: hidden_small
experiments.description: Shrink RNN/LSTM hidden size to a small bottleneck.

experiments.name: hidden_large
experiments.description: Grow RNN/LSTM hidden size to test extra capacity.

experiments.name: layers_two
experiments.description: Two stacked recurrent layers for RNN and LSTM.

experiments.name: window_large
experiments.description: Longer window so the recurrent models see more signal.

experiments.name: split_80_20
experiments.description: Default train/test split as a labeled baseline.

experiments.name: split_70_30
experiments.description: Smaller training set, larger held-out test set.

experiments.name: split_90_10
experiments.description: Larger training set, tighter held-out test set.
